title: AI Agent Architect
description: Designs and orchestrates autonomous multi-agent systems that plan, use tools, and execute complex workflows with minimal supervision.

title: Context Engineer
description: The new "knowledge architect" role. Builds dynamic context systems, RAG pipelines, memory layers, and retrieval strategies that make agents actually reliable.

title: LLMOps Engineer
description: The production engineers of the LLM era. Own inference optimization, cost control, evaluation pipelines, versioning, monitoring, and reliable deployment at scale.

title: AI Red Teamer
description: Professional adversary. Stress-tests frontier models, finds jailbreaks, simulates sophisticated attacks, and hardens guardrails before real-world deployment.

title: AI Safety Engineer
description: Builds the technical foundations for trustworthy AI: evaluations, interpretability, scalable oversight, constitutional AI, and robustness testing.

title: AI Governance Lead
description: Translates regulation into practice. Builds responsible AI frameworks, runs risk assessments, ensures EU AI Act / NIST compliance, and manages AI audit programs.

title: Chief AI Officer (CAIO)
description: The newest C-suite role. Owns enterprise-wide AI strategy, talent, risk posture, investment decisions, and how AI transforms the entire business model.
